final_answer: COVID-19 is an infectious respiratory illness caused by the coronavirus SARS-CoV-2. Symptoms can appear 2 to 14 days after exposure and range from mild to severe, with urgent symptoms including difficulty breathing and chest pain. COVID-19 vaccines undergo rigorous testing to ensure safety and effectiveness. Preventive measures include vaccination, physical distancing, mask-wearing, and handwashing [doc3_covid19.txt:chunk_00000, chunk_00002, chunk_00006, chunk_00012].
